name: agent-skills
description: Custom agent skills — research, architecture analysis, and cross-project pattern mapping

plugins.name: inspirera
plugins.description: Analyzes external links (GitHub repos, articles, docs) and maps concepts, patterns, and primitives to your own projects. Cross-pollination analysis with applicability matrix.

plugins.name: profilera
plugins.description: Mines Claude Code session history to build an agent-consumable decision profile. Extracts patterns from memory, conversations, history, and configs.

plugins.name: utvecklarn
plugins.description: Autonomous vision-driven development cycles. Independently decides what to build, evolves projects, and makes structured progress on a codebase.
